nodes.title: Display Story Beat
nodes.description: Given a StoryBeat ScriptableObject with text, speaker, optional portrait, and display duration, when DialogueSystem.ShowStoryBeat() is called, then the text is displayed in manuscript-themed UI for the specified duration.

nodes.title: Story Beat Sequence
nodes.description: Given a list of StoryBeats, when NarrativeManager.PlayStoryBeats() is called, then each beat is displayed in sequence with its duration, and a completion callback fires after the last beat.

nodes.title: Dialogue Choice Present
nodes.description: Given a DialogueChoiceBeat with multiple choices, when DialogueSystem presents it, then choice buttons appear in manuscript-themed UI with the choice text labels.

nodes.title: Dialogue Choice Resolve
nodes.description: Given a DialogueChoiceBeat is presented, when the player selects the correct choice then it triggers a location transition. When the wrong choice is selected (and a sin miniboss is configured), then a sin miniboss encounter starts.

nodes.title: Boss Dialogue Entry
nodes.description: Given a boss encounter with entry dialogue configured, when combat starts and BossDialogueManager processes entry, then the entry dialogue lines are displayed in manuscript UI.

nodes.title: Boss Dialogue Midpoint
nodes.description: Given a boss in combat whose HP crosses the midpoint threshold (e.g. 50%), when BossDialogueManager checks, then midpoint dialogue lines are triggered.

nodes.title: Boss Dialogue Desperation
nodes.description: Given a boss in combat whose HP crosses the desperation threshold (e.g. 20%), when BossDialogueManager checks, then desperation dialogue lines are triggered.

nodes.title: Manuscript Theme Display
nodes.description: Given BossDialogueDisplay, when text is shown, then ManuscriptUITheme styling is applied: parchment background, ink text color, gold emphasis, rubrication for key words.
